title: Madison Cross Back Chair - Mark II - Antique Fruitwood
features: The New Madison Cross Back Chair - Mark II features a stronger, handcrafted rubber wood frame for commercial use.
This stackable chair is built for indoor and outdoor events and ships fully assembled.
If you preferred the original Madison Cross Back Chairs because of the comfortably wider 16.5'' seat, do not fret.
Our new Mark II Madison Cross Back Chairs bring back everything you loved in the previous model and improved on it.

The sturdy rubber wood construction has been replaced by a more durable, hand crafted frame that's better built for sustained commercial use, whether it be an indoor wedding ceremony or an outdoor anniversary party.
Madison Cross Back Chairs are available in Fruitwood, Antique Fruitwood and Pecan and don't forget to add a seat cushion for added comfort.

As always, these chairs ship free when you puy 50+ or combine them with tables, like our Folding Farm Table!If you appreciated the durability and classic appeal of commercial-grade seating, the Titan Event Furniture™ Rubber Wood Chair is a perfect fit.
Constructed from solid rubber wood, this chair is built to handle the demands of event venues, restaurants, and rental use.
With an overall height of 35.5’’ and an 18’’ seat height, it provides a comfortable sitting experience, while the 16" x 15.5" seat ensures ample space.
Despite its sturdy build, this chair remains lightweight at just 10 lbs. and is fully stackable for easy storage.
With a static weight capacity of 400 lbs. and a dynamic weight capacity of 300 lbs., it offers reliable support in any setting.
Best of all, these chairs ship fully assembled, and ship free when you buy 50+ or combine them with any purchase over $5k!

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 50 or more

faq.question: Will I be able to stack my Cross Back Chairs
faq.answer: Yes, all of our Cross Back Chairs are stackable. We generally stack them 7 chairs high on the floor, on pallets or on one of our stacking chair dollies.

faq.question: What is Rubber Wood?
faq.answer: Rubber wood comes from the Pará rubber tree and is a durable, eco-friendly hardwood. It's strong, resistant to warping, and has a smooth grain, making it ideal for commercial furniture like cross back chairs.

faq.question: Are Madison Cross Back Chairs suitable for outdoor use?
faq.answer: Yes! Madison Cross Back Chairs are designed for both indoor and outdoor use. Their durable rubber wood construction makes them a great choice for event venues, restaurants, and rental setups. However, to extend their lifespan, it's best to store them indoors or in a covered area when not in use
